privileged_info_summary: The task 'discontinue_product_legacy@1' uses a synthetic WooCommerce product named 'Vintage Camera Lens' with SKU 'VCL-50MM'. The product is created by setup_task.sh if not already present. Success verification requires: (1) stock status set to 'outofstock', (2) visibility set to hidden (both 'exclude-from-search' and 'exclude-from-catalog' terms), (3) short description appended with the exact text '**DISCONTINUED: This item is no longer available.**', and (4) product post_status remains 'publish'. The task references a real product image from the WooCommerce demo site (http://demo.woothemes.com/woocommerce/wp-content/uploads/sites/56/2013/06/T_2_front.jpg).
